SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK : P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
